title: Better Forge Chat (LuckPerms) Fork
description: A Forge based serverside chat mod to allow prefixes, suffixes and integration with LuckPerms and FTB-Essentials nicknames.
body:
This mod is a fork of [BetterForgeChat](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/betterforgechat-with-luckperms-support), the creator of this mod has not released updates for 2 years, so it was decided to create a fork for version 1.20.1

All rights to the mod belong to [abc123mewot](https://www.curseforge.com/members/abc123mewot/projects).

BetterForgeChat
A Forge based serverside chat mod to allow prefixes, suffixes and integration with LuckPerms and FTB-Essentials nicknames.

Why does this exist?
If you are building a forge modded server on MC1.20.1 there unfortunately are no decent mods available due to SpongeForge not supporting MC1.20.1 - this mod only supports MC1.20.1 forge servers for this very reason.

To date this is the most feature-rich chat mod for Forge 1.20.1 blowing all others out of the water

Features
LuckPerms integration
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca0fd84832988aa05c82126af238e9d31450cb56.png)

Tab list integration
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa637cf14cbdaef5008af7db9559a0843ea2066d.png)

Nickname integration
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d79678f97d95b371032040e714f77136fb1e9db.png)

Colors command
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7d1721599bb43196b79e836235b365c2a7f6ddff.png)

Markdown support
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/92d59a30ce2864b6777a6e1b80913b73cb11c01f.png)

Permissions plugin integration
Works with any Forge Permissions plugin to provide easy permission management, see the permissions on [the WIKI](https://github.com/abc123me/BetterForgeChat/wiki)

Highly configurable
Customizable timestamp formats
Customizable tab-list playername formats
All features can be turned on/off easily
Customizable permission nodes
Out-Of-Box integration with LuckPerms and FTBEssentials
Installation
Get the latest version off CurseForge
Add JAR file to serverside **mods/ folder**
